intervention.label: Physiological Sigh
intervention.instructions: Two short inhales, one long exhale.

stateMachine.templateReply: Starting physiological sigh now. Follow the haptic on the watch — I'll check in when it ends.

coach.reply: Great! Starting the physiological sigh now—two quick inhales through your nose, then a long exhale. I'll haptic-pace you. Ready?

tier2.rationale: Reply correctly transitions to committed state, initiates the intervention without citing raw biometrics, and matches the user's affirming intent.

intervention.label: Physiological Sigh
intervention.instructions: Two short inhales, one long exhale.

stateMachine.templateReply: Starting physiological sigh now. Follow the haptic on the watch — I'll check in when it ends.

coach.reply: Great! Starting the physiological sigh now—I'll set a timer. Breathe in through your nose for two counts, then a longer exhale through your mouth. Ready? I'll pace it with haptic taps.

tier2.rationale: Reply correctly transitions to committed state, initiates the intervention with clear instructions, avoids raw biometric numbers, and stays within wellness guidance boundaries.

intervention.label: 60-Second Stretch
intervention.instructions: Stand up, roll shoulders, tilt neck side to side.

stateMachine.templateReply: 60-Second Stretch timer set. I'll ping you when you're back.

coach.reply: Great! Starting your 30-second sigh right now. Breathe in slowly through your nose, then exhale longer through your mouth. I'll send a haptic when time's up. You've got this.

tier2.rationale: Reply correctly transitions to committed state, initiates the intervention, avoids raw biometric numbers, and matches the user's affirming intent.

coach.reply: Perfect! Starting the physiological sigh now. Two quick inhales through your nose, then a long exhale through your mouth. I'll set a 30-second timer and guide you with haptic taps. Ready?

tier2.rationale: Reply correctly transitions to committed state, provides clear intervention guidance, avoids raw biometric numbers, and matches the user's affirming intent.

intervention.label: 30-Second Gratitude
intervention.instructions: Name one thing you're grateful for.

stateMachine.templateReply: Logged. Tap "I did it" when you've finished — one line is plenty.

coach.reply: Perfect! Starting your 30-second sigh right now—I'll send haptic pulses to pace you. Breathe in slowly through your nose, then sigh out through your mouth. Ready?

tier2.rationale: Reply correctly transitions to committed state, offers a concrete micro-intervention with clear instructions, no biometric numbers cited (correct for non-greeting state), no clinical claims.

intervention.label: 30-Second Gratitude

coach.reply: Perfect! Starting your 30-second sigh right now. I'll send haptic pulses to pace you—inhale slowly through your nose, exhale longer through your mouth. Ready?

tier2.rationale: Reply correctly transitions to committed state, offers a concrete micro-intervention with clear instructions, no biometric numbers cited, no clinical language.

intervention.label: One Slow Exhale
intervention.instructions: Just one slow exhale, right now.

stateMachine.templateReply: Even smaller — Just one slow exhale, right now. Can you?

coach.reply: Got it. Just one slow exhale right now—take 8 seconds. That's it. Ready?

tier2.rationale: Appropriately scales down the intervention in response to user's decline, stays in negotiating state, no biometric numbers cited, no clinical language.
